title: Hiring Software Engineer at DeHaat International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at DeHaat International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the DeHaat International Enterprises family as a Software Engineer in Dhanbad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
